checkpoints.objective: create and execute a downloader for a self-contained Unidbg Maven offline dependency cache
checkpoints.source_of_truth: user explicit download request, local 03-unidbg-runner pom.xml, and fresh Maven online/offline resolution output
checkpoints.scope: download only Maven dependencies/plugins into signer-implementations/03-unidbg-runner/dependencies; do not fetch proprietary SO/AAR/cert/device data
checkpoints.adjustment: go-offline alone omitted dynamic Surefire/JUnit runtime providers; explicitly fetch surefire-junit-platform 3.2.5 and junit-platform-launcher 1.10.2, then require offline build plus 46 tests before declaring the cache ready
